sports.name: Soccer
sports.description: A team sport played between two teams of eleven players using a spherical ball.

sports.name: Tennis
sports.description: A racket sport played individually or in doubles, aiming to hit the ball over the net into the opponent's court.

sports.name: Basketball
sports.description: A team sport where two teams of five players try to score by shooting a ball through a hoop.

sports.name: Badminton
sports.description: A racquet sport played in singles or doubles, hitting a shuttlecock across a net.

sports.name: Cricket
sports.description: A bat-and-ball game played between two teams of eleven players.

sports.name: Swimming
sports.description: An individual sport involving movement through water using various strokes.

sports.name: Volleyball
sports.description: A team sport where two teams of six players aim to score by grounding the ball on the opponent's court.

sports.name: Table Tennis
sports.description: A fast-paced sport played individually or in doubles, hitting a lightweight ball across a table.

sports.name: Boxing
sports.description: A combat sport where two individuals fight using punches under strict rules.

sports.name: Hockey
sports.description: A team sport played with sticks and a ball or puck, aiming to score in the opponent's goal.

sports.name: Archery
sports.description: A precision sport where individuals shoot arrows at a target from a set distance.

sports.name: Baseball
sports.description: A bat-and-ball game played between two teams of nine players.

sports.name: Rugby
sports.description: A contact team sport played with an oval ball between two teams.

sports.name: Golf
sports.description: An individual sport where players use clubs to hit balls into a series of holes on a course.

sports.name: Karate
sports.description: A martial art involving striking techniques and defensive movements.

sports.name: Judo
sports.description: A modern martial art and Olympic sport involving throws and grappling.

sports.name: Kabaddi
sports.description: A contact team sport where players tag opponents and return to their half without being tackled.

sports.name: Fencing
sports.description: A combat sport involving swordplay between two individuals.

sports.name: Rowing
sports.description: A water sport where individuals or teams propel a boat using oars.

sports.name: Cycling
sports.description: A sport involving racing bicycles over various terrains and distances.
